svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="UK0nDpt2lEqy0vrxqzlL"> <mxGraphModel dx="1030" dy="535" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "erDiagram

USER ||--o{ INTERVIEW_SESSION : has
INTERVIEW_SESSION ||--o{ QUESTION : contains
QUESTION ||--o| ANSWER : has
INTERVIEW_SESSION ||--|| EVALUATION : has

USER {
 BIGSERIAL id PK
 VARCHAR first_name
 VARCHAR last_name
 VARCHAR email
 TEXT password_hash
 TIMESTAMP created_at
 TIMESTAMP updated_at
}

INTERVIEW_SESSION {
 BIGSERIAL id PK
 BIGINT user_id FK
 TEXT position
 TEXT level
 TEXT status
 TIMESTAMP started_at
 TIMESTAMP ended_at
}

QUESTION {
 BIGSERIAL id PK
 BIGINT session_id FK
 TEXT question_text
 INTEGER question_order
}

ANSWER {
 BIGSERIAL id PK
 BIGINT question_id FK
 TEXT answer_text
}

EVALUATION {
 BIGSERIAL id PK
 BIGINT session_id FK
 DECIMAL technical_score
 DECIMAL completeness_score
 JSONB strengths
 JSONB weaknesses
 TEXT recommendation
}",
 "config": null
